3194800.name: ALFRED IS A BAD GUY
3194800.description:
ALFRED is a BAD GUY is a board game for 4 to 8 players in which you have to team up to defeat the Boss of the board in a dice duel. But beware: some players won't have the same objective as others. Secret roles are assigned at the start of the game, dividing players into 2 teams. The good guys, whose aim is to defeat the Boss, and the bad guys, whose aim is to keep the Boss alive and eliminate the good guys.

To achieve your goals, you'll need to roll dice to scour the board for items, bonuses and extra dice. You'll start the game with a 6-sided die, while the Boss will have a 100-sided one. You'll need to move around the board to find the bonus squares you need to better equip yourself before facing your opponents.

The Boss is accompanied by 4 lieutenants who give him bonuses and strengthen him. But he can also count on the players who will take on one of the bad guy roles, among them:

- The Reaper, who will cut off the heads of pawns who talk too much.

- The Puppeteer, who will take control of another pawn and do whatever he likes with it.

- Marc, who will mark your dice to make them explode in front of the Boss.

The good guys won't be left out in the cold, either:

- The Hero, who will have a more powerful die for his fights.

- Urgle, who will defy death and make the Grim Reaper bow.

All other players will be Simple Pawns.

In short, gather your friends, log on to your favorite voice chat software, grab your dice and your investigative skills to find out who the bad guys are and defeat the Boss of ALFRED is a BAD GUY!
